title: Senior Teacher - iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Senior Teacher in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd:
iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd!
